market_pulse.one_liner: Equities grind higher as VIX retreats to 18, but options flow hints at a rotation from overbought tech into defensives and energy.
market_pulse.sector_rotation: Capital rotating out of AI/tech leadership into energy and defensive healthcare names.

opportunities.thesis: Massive $11.6M premium in $305 puts (2270x OI) and additional heavy put buying at $270/$275 signal strong institutional bearishness, coinciding with 'AI bubble cracks' headline.
opportunities.catalyst: AI sentiment souring and heavy put flow creating downside pressure; break below $300 likely accelerates selling.

opportunities.thesis: Unusual $4.8M call premium at the $190 strike (1100x OI) points to defensive demand; safe-haven flows increasing amid rotation headlines.
opportunities.catalyst: Flight to safety and healthcare rotation, amplified by dividend appeal.

opportunities.thesis: RSI(76.3) deeply overbought, near highs with screener signal 'overbought, trending_up'; mean reversion setup in a low-VIX environment.
opportunities.catalyst: Profit-taking in financials or a VIX spike triggers reversion.

risk_alerts.alert: VIX at 18.72 (-3.7%) reflects complacency; a sudden spike on hawkish data or earnings miss could hit overbought tech and banks hard.
AI bubble narrative cracking—unusual put flow in AMZN, META, GOOGL alongside rotation headlines could trigger a 5-7% tech drawdown.

calendar.event: No major economic releases; light Fedspeak calendar

immediate: Initiate short AMZN position via outright puts or put spreads targeting $270.
Buy JNJ calls or stock on a breakout above $190.
Consider shorting RY.TO with a stop above $158.
